data: @ 100 ft tall and 10 ft wide, looked like two vertical rows of lights, approx 300-500 feet high in the sky
I was walking alone on my terrace and suddenly I saw something weird on the sky and I got scared.I thought It's something paranormal.
Stepped outside for fresh air therapy and bogey! all of a sudden a spark!- to the West
Cylindrical craft similar to ICBM no sound consistent speed. Wings on the side and tail seems small.
Looked out window as approaching DIA, looked down and saw a white pill looking thing below us traveling away from us at high speed
4 lights circling over the clouds, looked like big spotlights but in the clouds
Second time in a year! Waited till i saw again just to be sure I wasnt losing my mind
Upside down black object with silver glints flying at quick speed
My captain and I saw moving stars. Looked kinda like satellites.
I saw several white volleyball sized and shaped white orbs in the sky rotating all around each other with no obvious pattern
Saw this object moving VERY fast with NO sound whatsoever
Pulsating orb that disappeared out of nowhere
I was on the trampoline with my daughter we were laying down and looking at the sky when we saw these objects.
Looking west saw strange light that was stationary. It split into two . Visibility was clear. At the sane time saw two aircraft.
UAP buzzed our military aircraft at the nascar fly over 3.3.24
Blue light zoomed across the desert sky
Had foggy gas following it and was moving super slow. Like hovering over in front of my house.
At 1st, thought it was meteor, but it kept going.
Triangle craft moving in crazy way and fast
Multiple orbs/ lights merging into one.
In the sw sky moving east ish, a total of 7 orange lights, brighter than stars, eventually disappearing in the sky.
Reflective cube seen rotating in the northern sky.
Balloon like object that appeared to be connected to each other elevated in SE direction before moving in the N distance.
Bright orange trail which then seemed to disappear, and reappear as a milky or cloudy orb in the sky still traveling South..lost sight.
3 objects flying in slowly in a straight line formation below cloud cover, then directional maneuvering, vertical maneuvering
Saw a super bright dot (what we thought was a star) but noticed it was moving so decided to film it
We witnessed a hazy orb of light approach from the sunset SW horizon cross overhead and change from a a hazy cloud into a single light
A white-bright light moving to the South-East disapearing after ejecting a white vopor-like cloud ahead of itself.
At sunset I was sitting on my porch and saw two crafts.
No object was seen only a ring of foggy light in the dusk sky.
Silver Craft Object With Red and Green Light’s over Victoria (Hillside and Oaklands Neighborhood)
Glowing outline of something huge slowly pulsated thru low clouds as it moved silent and slowly along the beach
White orb descended to 1000 AGL, exploded with a white halo, smoke and changed direction.
they were both stationary for the few minutes I watched and then they both flew straight up and through a cloud
Driving westbound just after sunset, a glowing orb of light in the SW sky was hovering and moving sound a localized position.
Black square was hovering, and then it disappeared and reappeared again
An object with two flashing lights hovering for about 5 minutes no sound.
Fixed cluster of greenish lights traveling from east to west in the northern sky.
Orb with halo moving NE and then S, about 20 angular degrees per minute, in 90 seconds of time, in S metro Denver at dusk
A light, the size of my hand, not round, moved through the sky almost like a fairy or dragonfly would.
Glowing light moved slowing across sky and then expanded an apparatus in front of it for a few seconds until vanishing.
Driving home from getting pizza when noticed a bright light in the sky from afar
Broad daylight. No noise. Looked white metallic
Three white lights that moved together
Initially we observed a ballon like object floating in the sky that moved and converged with a second object
Very bright yellow light in the low sky that changed to a very dim red blinking light
Two luminous orbs of light, no exterior propulsion, highly maneuverable
Lights in a string very oddly lighting
A hand above the horizon, streaking from NE to SW an orange, yellow, round light appaered and disappeared.
Bright white with some translucency (seeing “aura” listed as a characteristic below is appropriate). One of us saw some red, also.
Saw a dark object flying northwest in night sky.
I saw 2 potential UAP's, 1 that was a morphing blob and 1 White Cigar
Bright ball of light blinks away
UFO went across the sky slowly
Metallic silver object that was highly reflective
I'm a photographer and I was on the pier shooting images of sailboats and the kite festival. You can see the UAP in the photo.
Red light appeared with a comet like wake traveling west to southeast over San Diego
Driving on highway, mom sees bright sphere being powered by some sort of fire. Then shoots something and goes away.
It was near by north bound on hwy 101 mountain or hillside.
I viewed an extremely bright white object falling rapidly with orange exhaust almost in lines.
White circle met up with 2 more white circles, formed a triangle, flew upward into the sky
I saw a massive dark V-shaped craft covered in small lights traveling across the western sky and over the San Jacinto mountains.
Two white/metallic oval-sphere unidentifiable objects moving in unison through sky at a steady speed.
Six or seven lights on sky. Seemed quite close.
Two lights were flying in the sky by the craft or ship they were attached to was invisible
Object flying across the sky with very unusual shape and color. Emitted no sound or light
Immediately after watching Space X Dragon flew over us, an unknown curved shaped object flew the opposite way. No lights. No sounds.
Saw Orb shaped object over water
At night, it was made out of multiple "light orbs", moving in synchronicity. The light orbs were in a Pentagon shape formation
Flew in a large oval, about 2 miles, size of a car, flying about 12,000 ft high about 40(?) mph
Stunningly well-defined ball of white, green and red colored lights, as it was falling!
3 bright orange orbs in a line would fade out and come back minutes later changing direction and then repeating for 30 minutes
8 egg shape crafts moving very fast in a v formation.
Dark patch appeared, blocking stars. Blinding white flash in the center, object disappeared
I was driving north bound on 95 coming home from a camping trip and my son and I saw a floating orb. No mistaking it as balloon or plan
Inverted v shaped, 7 bright lights,fast moving , no sound traveling north to northeast
Spinning upright cylindrical object descends, hovers in place and drifts before ascending more quickly.
30-50' diameter light burnt orange sphere which came from the west/southwest over my farm, flew for 20-30 miles before disappearing.
we saw the object approaching our location from the north east at a high speed
I was walking from parking a truck I looked up admiring the night sky when something caught my eye 2 orb like objects.
Bright white light moving slowly then turned red and receded until it disappeared
Driving on highway in a wooded area and saw a chrome like sphere object hovering in one spot quietly.
One smaller yellow oval shaped out of nowhere toward the larger squarish shaped object and hovered than both slowly disappeared
What at first glance appeared birdlike., not so much no
Barely visible, like it was camouflaged specifically for human perception, only the movement gave its shape away
Spotted silent key like objects in sky
We watched the space x crew 8 launch. After we saw 4 orbs of light.
The cluster or orbs were kind of stationary, but moved about within the group.
My parent’s ring camera capture the object slowly moving across the sky at 12-12 am to 1:10 am, it traveled from south to north.
Pulsing light moved towards the moon and then away from the moon at a 90 degree angle
There were 4 flying objects in the same area. They all went in different directions 2 went to Mexico area
The object appeared from the right to left directly in front, then stopped mid-air. Was low enough to see shape and lights underneath.
Spotted by eyesight first, then photographed. Appeared behind/between 2 telecommunications towers
Saw unk shape object just darker that the surrounding sky. moving north
I've been seeing these lights since January 15, 2024; they appear stationary but drift west and shimmy.
Object in sky peculiar air trail. 2 lights-Objects in its trail
Noticed a stationary round object with LOTS of flashing white lights
Looks like a derigible/cargo by plane
Saw an object appear out in the sky and disappeared after a few seconds.
While hunting, I stopped scanning with a thermal optic and looked out over the lake where a green orb appeared.
I saw a light going up down and all around. They weren't going straight and did not blink
Two police officers on night shift noticed 2 lights above the horizon moving laterally then horizontally.
Bright green orb came straight down from the sky into the lake, followed by a second green orb that appeared closer to me then shot off
After pulling out of Crumbl cookies heading west down Waddell Rd I saw a V shaped object in the sky moving in weird angles.
had my camera with me when i spotted this object moving back and forth in the sky changing colors as well
I tried to take photo /video but my phone shut right off as if it wasn’t fully charged this ship was massive it was no sound lost time
It was late at night and i went to go take my dog out to use the bathroom and I saw a suspected ufo flying around my house
Black cylinder with an orange light
I saw 2 objects above and to the left of me and then they simply disappeared
Observed a sheer white pulsating object moving high in atmosphere moving from southwest to northeast of my position
Black triangle craft silently traveling directly above me, emitting no sound save for a humming vibration that I could feel and hear.
Spotted a sphere-like metallic object to the northeast while on the walking path.
A slowly streaking orange glow dispersed into many fragments before disappearing and then there were formations made by pins of light
Saw a triangular set of white lights going from left to right for about 5 seconds then faded and disappeared
Bright white light at first. Twin lights eventually with strobe on the left of them. White lights
3 orbs moving in unnatural flying patterns
Observed structured lights following a plane. UAP changed position relative to the plane it was following with a smooth quickness.
Looked east clear sky noticed an orb
An UFO flying at a high rate of speed towards north-east.
A clouded light moving across the night sky.
Glowing light and O ring smoke
Floating foggy white circular orb. Traveled northwest to southeast
Looking due west I see a strange light traveling across the sky.
I saw a white orb floating in the sky going up. It then sent a circular ring of propulsion or clouds outwards before it ascended
White orb separating into multiple orbs
White orb floating towards the ocean horizontally
An out of focus circle appeared and moved quickly. The blue light formed from the circle and then projected two smaller lights outward.
Flashing light object floating around irregularly in the sky. It hovers, and maeuvers in ways planes can’t.
Saw a strange light moving across sky. Looked like it was flying through clouds but there were no clouds.
Walking outside and noticed something bright flying in our direction i began recording
Changing shapes, spinning multi-colored lights, portal jagged edges, disc w/ beams of light, low and high in sky.
A pyramid-shaped black object the size of a basketball flying above the clouds 150ft from our plane. Had no wings, propellers, or trail
Black flying cylinder object at eye level to me on airplane.
Seen as I exited my car after returning home from work.
A craft within a hazy cloud around it crossing the sky.
Silver Cylinder moving slowing in the sky.
The video tells it all. I saw something, assumed it was nothing, then pulled over and filmed it, and then it disappeared.
Black disks in V formation with black helicopter near them. Objects were larger than the helicopter.
5-8 orb-shaped lights, in a perfectly straight row heading SE then suddenly disappearing.
I did not see the exact sighting, and I’m not entirely sure what it is but it was caught on my security camera
Noticed at first what we thought was a star that just appeared out of nowhere and moved from NW to SE very erractic.
2 fast moving gray objects (like 2 curved inverted v's) flying nw to se direction
I witnessed a ufo go above my head glowing bright green with a yellow center!
Equidistant solid lights heading for the head of Orion and disappearing
ORB became visible 145 degrees 20 miles from my home deck at an estimated altitude of 10,000 FEET
Did not fly in a straight line
Lost power and went outside 10min after and noticed this very large horizontal string of lights
Taking pictures of stars, saw something weird
Walking dogs with my wife, and this weird formation floated across the sky and looked like it was morphing.
Traveled the whole view of the sky in a second or two
Three balls of light in a triangle shape that were about two hundred feet off the ground were moving a slow pace.
UFO with red/white light seen in Seattle
White Spherical UAP about 1000 feet below us traveling faster than the plane I was on going west away from Florida over the Gulf.
Below plane level. Silent, very bright. Come from the NW, travelled over the back on my property to side of the house then it was gone.
Bright light appeared in sky, traveled 2-3 min, light dissipated and could no longer see.
While reviewing pictures of a full rainbow, the camera detected an anomaly that was not visible with the naked eye
Black object/craft flying closely to american commercial flight at remarkable speeds.
This light in the night sky was slightly larger than the stars but much more brilliant, constantly flashing multiple colors.
Seen something that looked like a laynard in the sky cruising by
Noticed a pair of red orbs that seemingly vanish into thin air followed by single red orbs emerging over a house directly Northeast
rectangular object with many colored lights on the bottom moving from one side to the other
Large silent craft - appeared to be a disk seen from side, with six circular white lights, steady-on, and one dark red blinking light
A silent silver cube flashing in the sun, hovering and swooping around.
I have 4:09 video of ufo in sky over Nc
It was a white car shaped object
Saw a equal sided black triangle traveling east to west at seemingly high altitude.
One larger object and about 37 more distant moving objects were observed - may correlate with NUFORC Sighting 175071.
Flying west to east above liberty church drive cigar shape 1 half still on fire - fire went out and a trail of smoke was seen
I have seen these every night since April 4th of 2023 100s every night until now.
A white light appeared then vanished
I had my tripod with my IR camera I was trying to initiate contact with a laser from the evidence on my video I obviously did
I was driving home from my girlfriends house and looked up and saw this craft in the sky with a bright light that was pulsating.
Upright chrome disk changing positions instantly. Unnatural movement
Invisible/Blurry object left a streak, stopped or slowed, then zoomed off.
Driving, saw an enormous star. Started to move, then got huge and flew right over the road in front of my car.
First, we saw what look like vapor trails, but they were odd looking. A few minutes later we saw the orb floating across the sky.
I saw multiple lights that were interactive with each other and they would disappear like a mist and reappear over and over.
Watching Sunkist plant fire from 5m distance and thought I was watching embers fly but realized not embers and believe it to be UFO UAP
2 large gold egg shaped objects circling each other while moving together along the tree line behind our house.
Fast moving, one object or group moving together
Saw a shiny object appearing in and out for 40 minutes until shining very brightly for 4 minutes, moving to the right and disappeared.
Red light flashing from right to left in a circular motion
Object while Flying expelled a cloud of smoke in front of it which formed a smoke ring and dissappeared through the center of it.
Object was flashing colored lights around it.
Very shiny metallic sphere hovering about tree line
I was riding as a passenger, I looked towards Mt.Baker and saw the object, it first turned black later blue to dissappear into the sky
I have a video of it it's not too clear but when you slow down the video you see this craft hit light speed in the opposite direction a
A friend showed this video to me saying it was on a night flight and is certain it wasn’t from the plane cabin nor his I phone focusing
The blue diamond shaped object can be seen during the last 1/3 of the video in the very far upper right rotating end over end .
It slowly flew over my house, hovered for ~5 sec, rotated 180 degrees, then shot off in 2 different directions.
Slow moving red balls moving across sky.
A bright object in the sky, which later separates, catches the attention, allowing to see another object behind it but further away.
A bright object in the sky, which later separates, catches the attention, allowing to see another object behind it but further away.
There were lights in the form of a triangle, they were a blue-ish, white color and it was directly above my house.
Looking up I had seen a fast moving abject that I can not explain, it wasn’t an aircraft
Strange shape in the sky that changed colour
Circular craft. Travelled across entire horizon line about 8 seconds.
Looked very far away in the sky, it was moving way to fast to be a plane,moving in every direction almost zooming but not super fast
A black round object followed an USAF A-10"HOG"
I have been videoing strange lights behind my house look like stars get really bright then dim then disappear
It changed direction in the opposite direction at an abnormal speed, ruling out that it was a drone
A flashing, rotating circle in the sky. Viewed w/ the naked eye. Video taken using an iPhone 8 recorded a little over 2 minutes
One Large stationary Craft with 6+ smaller craft zigzagging across the night sky
Sighting of several objects to include a triangle shaped object that flew overhead.
Black ball hazy, size of a VW bug. Moving at 50 to 70 mph at about 300 to 500 ft under a partial/sunny low cloud cover.
Three glowing orbs in a triangle formation floating in the sky over the trees.
I saw a rectangle floating through the sky. It looked very two dimensional.
Helicopter-like shape, with no canopy, no exhaust, or propulsion system.
UFO spotted early morning, moved fast unexplainable
It looked like a dumbell a small one for biceps. it had nothing in the middle, like the stick in the middle of the dumbell was missing
Took off from ground leaving vortices crossed I-240 to the south turned west heading toward me turned south and disappereded
We just saw a large circle glowing in the sky.
Upside down triangle, hovering over a house for at least 10 minutes
Walking with my partner and our twin babies at the time, we saw this object floating/moving in the sky. It did not look like a balloon.
Driver on Iowa Hwy 169 reports orbs, strange beings, missing time, and a vanishing semi; incident leaves him shaken.
Object flew in the sky, then swayed back and forth and disappeared very quickly behind the clouds.
7 UFOs in the shape of discs and others in a triangle formation one behind the other at~ 200 or 300 up to 800 meters from the ground
Massive floating object appeared approximately 30 feet off the ground
